title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXVIII. Relics.
content:
Hannah Bantry in the pantry,
            Eating a mutton bone;
        How she gnawed it, how she clawed it,
            When she found she was alone!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXVIII. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
